mapper.select: SELECT purchase_order_id, item_id, supplier_id, quantity, purchase_order_status, order_date, expected_arrival_date, created_at, updated_at FROM purchase_orders

SELECT purchase_order_id, item_id, supplier_id, quantity, purchase_order_status, order_date, expected_arrival_date, created_at, updated_at FROM purchase_orders WHERE purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_orders (item_id, supplier_id, quantity, purchase_order_status, order_date, expected_arrival_date) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{supplierId}, #{quantity}, #{purchaseOrderStatus}, #{orderDate}, #{expectedArrivalDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_orders SET item_id = #{itemId}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, quantity = #{quantity}, purchase_order_status = #{purchaseOrderStatus}, order_date = #{orderDate}, expected_arrival_date = #{expectedArrivalDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}
